caption: The video begins with a static title card featuring the official emblem of the Office of the Prime Minister of Saint Lucia. The emblem is prominently displayed in the center, surrounded by a circular border that includes the text "Office of the Prime Minister" and "Saint Lucia." Below the emblem, the text reads "Address at the Opening of Interpretation Centre Pigeon Island National Landmark," indicating that the video will document an event where an address is given at the opening of a new interpretation center at the Pigeon Island National Landmark. The scene remains unchanged throughout the initial frames, setting the stage for the subsequent content of the video.
